title: Gayatri Chalisa
intro: Shri Gayatri Chalisa - Hymn to Goddess Gayatri
description:
॥ Shri Gayatri Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥

Hreem Shreem Kleem medha prabha jeevan jyoti prachand.
Shanti kanti jagrat pragati rachna shakti akhand.
Jagat janani mangal karani Gayatri sukhdham.
Pranvaun Savitri swadha swaha puran kaam.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Bhurbhuvah swah Om yut janani.
Gayatri nit kalimal dahani.
Akshar chaubis param punita.
Inmein basen shastra shruti geeta.
Shashwat satoguni sat rupa.
Satya sanatan sudha anupa.
Hansarudh shwetambar dhari.
Swarna kanti shuchi gagan-bihari.
Pustak pushpa kamandalu mala.
Shubhra varna tanu nayan vishala.
Dhyan dharat pulakit hiy hoi.
Sukh upajat duhkh durmati khoi.
Kamdhenu tum sur taru chhaya.
Nirakar ki adbhut maya.
Tumhari sharan gahai jo koi.
Tarai sakal sankat son soi.
Saraswati Lakshmi tum Kali.
Dipai tumhari jyoti nirali.
Tumhari mahima paar na pavain.
Jo Sharad shat mukh gun gavain.
Char ved ki mat punita.
Tum Brahmani Gauri Sita.
Mahamantra jitne jag mahin.
Kou Gayatri sam nahin.
Sumirat hiy mein gyan prakasai.
Aalas paap avidya nasai.
Srishti beej jag janani Bhavani.
Kalratri varada kalyani.
Brahma Vishnu Rudra sur jete.
Tum son pavain surata tete.
Tum bhaktan ki bhakt tumhare.
Jananihin putra pran te pyare.
Mahima aparmpar tumhari.
Jai jai jai tripada bhayahari.
Purit sakal gyan vigyana.
Tum sam adhik na jagme aana.
Tumhin jani kachhu rahai na shesha.
Tumhin pay kachhu rahai na kalesha.
Janat tumhin tumhin hvai jayi.
Paras parasi kudhatu suhai.
Tumhari shakti dipai sab thai.
Mata tum sab thaur samai.
Grah nakshatra brahmand ghanere.
Sab gativan tumhare prere.
Sakal srishti ki pran vidhata.
Palak poshak nashak trata.
Mateshwari daya vrat dhari.
Tum san tare pataki bhari.
Japar kripa tumhari hoi.
Tapar kripa karen sab koi.
Mand buddhi te budhi bal pavain.
Rogi rog rahit ho javen.
Daridra mitai katai sab peera.
Nashai duhkh harai bhav bheera.
Grih klesh chit chinta bhari.
Nashai Gayatri bhay hari.
Santati heen susantati pavain.
Sukh sampati yut mod manavain.
Bhoot pishach sabai bhay khavain.
Yam ke doot nikat nahin aavain.
Jo sadhva sumiren chit layi.
Achhat suhag sada sukhdayi.
Ghar var sukh prad lahain kumari.
Vidhva rahen satya vrat dhari.
Jayati jayati jagadamb Bhavani.
Tum sam or dayalu na dani.
Jo satguru so diksha pave.
So sadhan ko safal banave.
Sumiran kare suruchi badbhagi.
Lahai manorath grihi viragi.
Asht siddhi navnidhi ki data.
Sab samarth Gayatri mata.
Rishi muni yati tapasvi yogi.
Aarat arthi chintit bhogi.
Jo jo sharan tumhari aaven.
So so man vanchit phal pavain.
Bal budhi vidya sheel swabhau.
Dhan vaibhav yash tej uchhau.
Sakal badhen upajen sukh nana.
Je yah path karai dhari dhyana.

॥ Doha ॥

Yeh chalisa bhakti yut path karai jo koi.
Tapar kripa prasannata Gayatri ki hoy.
meaning:
॥ Shri Gayatri Chalisa ॥

॥ Doha ॥

Hreem Shreem Kleem medha prabha jeevan jyoti prachand.
O Mother of intelligence, radiance, and life-force, you are the intense flame.
Shanti kanti jagrat pragati rachna shakti akhand.
You are the power of peace, splendor, awakening, progress, and eternal creation.
Jagat janani mangal karani Gayatri sukhdham.
O Mother of the world, doer of auspiciousness, Gayatri, the abode of happiness.
Pranvaun Savitri swadha swaha puran kaam.
I bow to you, O Savitri, Svadha, and Swaha, the fulfiller of all desires.

॥ Chaupai ॥

Bhurbhuvah swah Om yut janani.
O Mother of the Bhur, Bhuvah, and Svah (the three worlds) and Om, you are the source.
Gayatri nit kalimal dahani.
O Gayatri, you are the eternal destroyer of the impurities of Kaliyuga.
Akshar chaubis param punita.
Your twenty-four syllables are supremely holy.
Inmein basen shastra shruti geeta.
Within them dwell the Shastras, Shrutis, and the Gita.
Shashwat satoguni sat rupa.
You are eternal, the embodiment of Satoguna, and the form of truth.
Satya sanatan sudha anupa.
You are eternal truth and nectar, matchless in form.
Hansarudh shwetambar dhari.
Seated on a swan, you wear white garments.
Swarna kanti shuchi gagan-bihari.
You possess a golden radiance, are pure, and wander in the heavens.
Pustak pushpa kamandalu mala.
You hold a book, flower, kamandalu (water pot), and a rosary.
Shubhra varna tanu nayan vishala.
You have a bright complexion and large, beautiful eyes.
Dhyan dharat pulakit hiy hoi.
Meditating on you makes the heart overflow with joy.
Sukh upajat duhkh durmati khoi.
It generates happiness and removes sorrow and evil thoughts.
Kamdhenu tum sur taru chhaya.
You are like the Kamdhenu (wish-fulfilling cow) and the shade of the celestial tree.
Nirakar ki adbhut maya.
You are the wondrous illusion of the Formless One.
Tumhari sharan gahai jo koi.
Whoever takes refuge in you.
Tarai sakal sankat son soi.
Crosses over all crises and troubles.
Saraswati Lakshmi tum Kali.
You are Saraswati, Lakshmi, and Kali.
Dipai tumhari jyoti nirali.
Your light shines in a unique and divine way.
Tumhari mahima paar na pavain.
No one can fathom the end of your glory.
Jo Sharad shat mukh gun gavain.
Even if Saraswati (Sharad) sings your praises with a hundred mouths.
Char ved ki mat punita.
You are the holy Mother of the four Vedas.
Tum Brahmani Gauri Sita.
You are Brahmani, Gauri, and Sita.
Mahamantra jitne jag mahin.
Among all the great mantras in the world.
Kou Gayatri sam nahin.
There is none equal to the Gayatri Mantra.
Sumirat hiy mein gyan prakasai.
Remembering you illuminates the heart with knowledge.
Aalas paap avidya nasai.
It destroys laziness, sin, and ignorance.
Srishti beej jag janani Bhavani.
You are the seed of creation, O Mother Bhavani.
Kalratri varada kalyani.
You are Kalratri (the dark night of time), the grantor of boons, and auspiciousness itself.
Brahma Vishnu Rudra sur jete.
All the gods like Brahma, Vishnu, and Rudra.
Tum son pavain surata tete.
Attain their divine power and status from you.
Tum bhaktan ki bhakt tumhare.
You belong to the devotees, and the devotees belong to you.
Jananihin putra pran te pyare.
To the mother, the child is dearer than life itself.
Mahima aparmpar tumhari.
Your glory is infinite and beyond measure.
Jai jai jai tripada bhayahari.
Victory, victory, victory to the three-footed (Tripada) destroyer of fear.
Purit sakal gyan vigyana.
You are filled with all knowledge and science.
Tum sam adhik na jagme aana.
There is no one greater than you in this world.
Tumhin jani kachhu rahai na shesha.
Knowing you leaves nothing further to be known.
Tumhin pay kachhu rahai na kalesha.
Attaining you leaves no troubles or afflictions remaining.
Janat tumhin tumhin hvai jayi.
Those who know you become one with you.
Paras parasi kudhatu suhai.
Just as the Philosopher's stone turns base metal into gold.
Tumhari shakti dipai sab thai.
Your power shines in all places.
Mata tum sab thaur samai.
O Mother, you are infused in every place.
Grah nakshatra brahmand ghanere.
Planets, stars, and the many universes.
Sab gativan tumhare prere.
All are in motion by your inspiration.
Sakal srishti ki pran vidhata.
You are the life-giver of the entire creation.
Palak poshak nashak trata.
You are the sustainer, nourisher, destroyer, and protector.
Mateshwari daya vrat dhari.
O Mother, you are the holder of the vow of compassion.
Tum san tare pataki bhari.
Through you, even the greatest sinners are liberated.
Japar kripa tumhari hoi.
Upon whom your grace falls.
Tapar kripa karen sab koi.
Everyone bestows grace upon them.
Mand buddhi te budhi bal pavain.
The dull-witted attain the power of intellect.
Rogi rog rahit ho javen.
The diseased become free from their illnesses.
Daridra mitai katai sab peera.
Poverty is erased, and all pains are cut away.
Nashai duhkh harai bhav bheera.
It destroys sorrows and removes the fears of worldly existence.
Grih klesh chit chinta bhari.
Domestic strife and heavy mental anxiety.
Nashai Gayatri bhay hari.
Are destroyed by Gayatri, the remover of fear.
Santati heen susantati pavain.
Those without children receive good offspring.
Sukh sampati yut mod manavain.
They celebrate with joy, wealth, and happiness.
Bhoot pishach sabai bhay khavain.
Ghosts and demons all become fearful of you.
Yam ke doot nikat nahin aavain.
The messengers of Yamraj do not come near.
Jo sadhva sumiren chit layi.
Any married woman who remembers you with a focused mind.
Achhat suhag sada sukhdayi.
Her marriage remains blessed and always joyful.
Ghar var sukh prad lahain kumari.
Young girls receive a good home, husband, and happiness.
Vidhva rahen satya vrat dhari.
Widows remain steadfast in truth and their vows.
Jayati jayati jagadamb Bhavani.
Victory, victory to Mother Jagadamba Bhavani.
Tum sam or dayalu na dani.
There is no one as merciful or generous as you.
Jo satguru so diksha pave.
Whoever receives initiation from a true Guru.
So sadhan ko safal banave.
Makes their spiritual practices successful.
Sumiran kare suruchi badbhagi.
The fortunate one who remembers you with interest.
Lahai manorath grihi viragi.
Whether a householder or an ascetic, they attain their wishes.
Asht siddhi navnidhi ki data.
You are the giver of the eight Siddhis and nine treasures.
Sab samarth Gayatri mata.
O Mother Gayatri, you are all-powerful.
Rishi muni yati tapasvi yogi.
Sages, hermits, ascetics, and yogis.
Aarat arthi chintit bhogi.
The distressed, the seeker, the anxious, and the enjoyer.
Jo jo sharan तुम्हारी aaven.
Whoever comes to your refuge.
So so man vanchit phal pavain.
They all receive the fruits they desire in their hearts.
Bal budhi vidya sheel swabhau.
Strength, wisdom, knowledge, character, and nature.
Dhan vaibhav yash tej uchhau.
Wealth, grandeur, fame, and brilliance all rise high.
Sakal badhen upajen sukh nana.
Everything grows, and various types of happiness are born.
Je yah path karai dhari dhyana.
To the one who recites this with focus and meditation.

॥ Doha ॥

Yeh chalisa bhakti yut path karai jo koi.
Whoever recites this Chalisa with devotion.
Tapar kripa prasannata Gayatri ki hoy.
The grace and happiness of Gayatri is bestowed upon them.

faq.q1: What is the Gayatri Chalisa and what is its significance?
faq.a1: The Gayatri Chalisa is a sacred hymn of 40 verses dedicated to Goddess Gayatri, who is revered as Veda Mata (the Mother of all Vedas) and the Goddess of Wisdom. Reciting this Chalisa is a powerful way to dispel the darkness of ignorance, enlighten the intellect, and progress on the spiritual path.
faq.q2: What are the benefits of reciting the Gayatri Chalisa?
faq.a2:
Beyond peace of mind, the recitation offers several benefits:
Intellect and Wisdom: It is believed to sharpen the intellect and improve decision-making abilities.
Dispelling Ignorance: Its verses are powerful enough to remove mental confusion and negative thought patterns.
Focus and Concentration: It is highly beneficial for students and professionals seeking to improve their mental focus.
Spiritual Purification: It encourages pure, righteous, and positive thinking.
faq.q3: What is the best time to recite the Gayatri Chalisa?
faq.a3: The Brahma Muhurta (the early hours before sunrise) is considered the most auspicious time for Gayatri Sadhana. If that is not possible, reciting it during sunrise after taking a bath is excellent. Reciting it at sunset is also considered very auspicious.
faq.q4: Are there strict rules to follow?
faq.a4: Goddess Gayatri is the deity of light; she appreciates purity and sincerity. You do not need complex rituals. Simply sit in a quiet, clean place, calm your mind, and recite the verses with devotion. Living a righteous life and speaking the truth is the highest form of worship for the Mother.
faq.q5: What is the difference between the Gayatri Mantra and the Gayatri Chalisa?
faq.a5: The Gayatri Mantra (Om Bhur Bhuvah Svah...) is a powerful 'seed mantra' (Beej Mantra) that resonates with immense spiritual energy. The Gayatri Chalisa, on the other hand, is a collection of 40 verses that describe and praise the glory of Mother Gayatri. You can recite the Chalisa along with the Mantra to deepen your devotional connection.
